contracts.agentMessage:
SNAPLINE FOUND UI DRIFT

src/components/billing/invoices-table.tsx

2 violations:
- [error] arbitrary value: text-[10px] (line 141)
- [error] raw <button> used while <Button> exists (line 132)

Repair:
- Replace text-[10px] with text-xs (12px) if the value is still needed — arbitrary values bypass the design scale.
- Import Button from "@/components/ui/button" and replace the raw <button> with <Button>. Use variant props (variant="default" | "outline" | "ghost" | "destructive") instead of color classes.
